versions.version_description: Corrected some lyrics, improved chords for intermediate players.
Easier to play out and longer breaks for your sax player to really get in the groove.
The solo is a different type of solo and i explain a good way to strum. I also explain how to give it a better jazz feel to the song with the strumming.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]

[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]*   [ch]E7[/ch]  x2


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
I feel so unsure[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
As I take your hand[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]*     [ch]E7[/ch]
And lead you to the dance floor[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
As the music dies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Something in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Calls to mind a silver screen[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]*   [ch]E7[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
And all its sad goodbyes[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm never gonna dance again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Guilty feet have got no rhythm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Though it's easy to pretend[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]
I know you're not a fool[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]
I should have known better than to cheat a friend[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
And waste a chance that I've been given[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
So I'm never gonna dance again[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]
The way I danced with you[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
Time can never mend[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]*   [ch]E7[/ch]
The careless whisper of a good friend[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
To the heart and mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Ignorance is kind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
There's no comfort in the truth[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]*  [ch]E7[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
Pain is all you'll find[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm never gonna dance again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Guilty feet have got no rhythm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Though it's easy to pretend[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]
I know you're not a fool[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]
I should have known better than to cheat a friend[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
And waste a chance that I've been given[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
So I'm never gonna dance again[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]
The way I danced with you[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Tonight the music seems so loud[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
I wish that we could lose this crowd[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Maybe it's better this way[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
We'd hurt each other with the things we want to say[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]
We could have been so good together[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]
We could have lived this dance forever[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]
But now who's gonna dance with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]* [ch]E7[/ch]
Please stay[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm never gonna dance again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Guilty feet have got no rhythm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Though it's easy to pretend[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]
I know you're not a fool[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]
I should have known better than to cheat a friend[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
And waste a chance that I've been given[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
So I'm never gonna dance again[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]
The way I danced with you[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
Now that you've gone[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
Now that you've gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Dm[/ch]
Now that you've gone[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Was what I did so wrong[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]E[/ch]
So wrong that you had to leave me alone[/tab]

[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]  x2
